title: Slopes
body:
![Slopes Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbe7ac328166589dac6fec2a2772f5f7fbdc32e1.png)
Slopes is a basic road mod mainly meant for use alongside [Immersive Vehicles](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles), or other mods that add cars to Minecraft.

Whatever way you look at it, blocks are 1 meter tall, and most cars shouldn't be able to climb up that. This is why this mod adds several types of 'Slope' blocks, which all have 16 levels of height.

![Raising & Lowering a Slope block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ed816516586d0f88cb26216765e01ced0068852.png)

This mod was heavily inspired by another road mod, [Fureniku's Roads](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/furenikusroads). This mod will only be updated to versions which the aforementioned mod will not.



This mod does not include any cars. Instead, get them from the Motorpack Content Pack Group for [Immersive Vehicles](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles).
Get our packs here:

- [Craftspeed](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-craftspeed)

- [SVMP](https://modrinth.com/mod/svmp)

![Motorcraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f41f4f0abfdc512100e521d8c1ca779a3f717274.png)
